steps.title: Model the total charge
steps.content:
Let $m$ be the number of months. The total charge is the enrollment fee plus the monthly fee times $m$.
$$32+19m=203$$

steps.title: Solve for months
steps.content:
Subtract $32$ from both sides, then divide by $19$.
$$19m=203-32=171$$
$$m=\frac{171}{19}=9$$
The answer is C.
